violations.text: Egg wash was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods were assessed and additional ice was added during time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
Gaskets on the 1 door reach in and 3 door lowboy were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2025
The floors in the kitchen and in the back prep room were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (clam cakes) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. -Staff voluntarily disposed of the clam cakes and made new clam cakes during this inspection. -Proper glove use reviewed and no bare-hand contact with ready-to-eat foods reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023

The doors to the outside, located in the front, observed left open. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors and/or by installing door screens. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023

Refrigerator door gaskets at the prep station were observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. -Per interview of staff, gaskets on order for replacement. -Hand-washing sink in the back prep area observed in poor repair. Hand-washing sink is also on order for replacement. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
Plumbing underneath 3 bay sink observed leaking water. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023

The floors and walls in the back prep area and floors in the bar area observed in poor repair. Floors/walls shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
